app_info.subtitle: Shared AI memory
app_info.description: Kumbukum gives ChatGPT access to a user's authenticated private memory workspace. Users can search and retrieve notes, memories, and project metadata, then create new private notes and memories when requested.

justifications.read_only_justification: Creates a private note in the user's Kumbukum workspace, so it changes workspace state.
justifications.open_world_justification: Writes only to the user's private Kumbukum workspace and does not publish content to public internet systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Creates a new note and does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves a selected note by ID without modifying workspace data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Reads from the user's private Kumbukum workspace and does not change public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Lists notes from the user's workspace without creating or updating records.
justifications.open_world_justification: Reads private workspace data and does not write to public internet systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Searches stored notes and returns matching results without modifying data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Searches private Kumbukum notes and does not change public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Stores a new private memory in the user's Kumbukum workspace.
justifications.open_world_justification: Writes only to the user's private Kumbukum workspace and does not publish content publicly.
justifications.destructive_justification: Creates a new memory and does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Searches stored memories and returns matching results without modifying data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Searches private Kumbukum memories and does not change public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Searches stored memories and returns matching results without modifying data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Searches private Kumbukum memories and does not change public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves a selected memory by ID without modifying workspace data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Reads private Kumbukum memory data and does not change public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves suggested tags from existing workspace metadata without modifying records.
justifications.open_world_justification: Reads private Kumbukum tag data and does not change public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Lists available Kumbukum projects without modifying workspace data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Reads private workspace metadata and does not change public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves metadata for a selected project without modifying workspace data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Reads private workspace metadata and does not change public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves per-project note and memory counts without modifying records.
justifications.open_world_justification: Reads private workspace metadata and does not change public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

test_cases.description: Search and read notes in the review demo workspace.
test_cases.user_prompt: Search my Kumbukum notes for OpenAI review demo and open the product launch note.
test_cases.expected_output: Finds and reads the matching note, then summarizes its launch checklist and related context.

test_cases.user_prompt: What reviewer preference memories do I have for the OpenAI app submission?
test_cases.expected_output: Returns matching memory records such as reviewer preferences and summarizes the relevant guidance.

test_cases.description: Create persistent memory from a user instruction.
test_cases.user_prompt: Remember that OpenAI app review answers should be concise and source-backed.
test_cases.expected_output: Stores a new memory in the user's workspace and confirms what was remembered.

test_cases.description: Create a project note from conversation context.
test_cases.user_prompt: Create a note titled OpenAI review follow-up with a short checklist for testing OAuth and memory search.
test_cases.expected_output: Creates a private note with the requested title and checklist content.

test_cases.user_prompt: List my Kumbukum projects and show the note and memory counts.
test_cases.expected_output: Lists available projects and returns private workspace counts without changing data.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not invoke Kumbukum to save or crawl external URLs.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because URL saving, fetching, and crawling are not exposed in the public ChatGPT app profile.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not invoke Kumbukum to search or read email.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Find the demo review checklist email and summarize it.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because email tools are not exposed in the public ChatGPT app profile.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not invoke Kumbukum to sync git repositories.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Add https://github.com/kumbukum/kumbukum as a git sync repository.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because git sync tools are not exposed in the public ChatGPT app profile.
